narrative: The duplicate package-tree removal occurred after the original command ledger was sealed.
This reconciliation does not claim to be a contemporaneous record of the removal.
Git history provides the authoritative before-and-after record.
The present reconciliation verifies the trim and binds the final retained evidence package.
